question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not enumerate any main sections of the thesis; it merely states that there will be a short description of each chapter and appendix, so it fails to list the chapters.

question: Description
feedback: No brief descriptions of the contents of each section are provided; the sentence only mentions that descriptions will exist, not what they contain.

question: Structure
feedback: The single sentence does not convey the overall structure of the thesis; it lacks any indication of the order or relationship between chapters and appendices.
